description_long: This is a classic wingback armchair with a high, curved back and elegantly contoured armrests. The upholstery features a vintage-inspired floral print with large red and pink blossoms and scattered blue and beige accents on a light, textured fabric. The frame is painted in a distressed white finish, with ornate carvings along the top rail, arm supports, and apron, giving it a French provincial or shabby chic appearance. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing comfort and support, while the armrests are also upholstered for added softness. The legs are cabriole-shaped, further enhancing the traditional aesthetic. This armchair would be a striking and comfortable addition to a park, sidewalk café, or urban garden setting.
description: A vintage-style wingback armchair with floral upholstery, white carved wood frame, and cabriole legs. The chair features plush padding and ornate details for a classic, elegant look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high winged back, floral upholstery, padded seat, and ornate white frame with cabriole legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the curved armrest, winged side, and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous floral fabric and the gently curved top rail of the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest contour and the full profile of the chair's side.
attribute_armrest_design: upholstered and padded, curved wood frame with carved details
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged, fully upholstered with gentle curve and floral pattern
attribute_leg_type: carved cabriole wooden legs, painted white
attribute_upholstery_pattern: floral print with large red and pink blossoms on a light background
